rules.detail: final preflight must PASS before any export artifact is created
.dsxu trace/runs evidence remains source-side only and must not be included in release/export
node_modules is local build/test dependency and must not be included in release/export
owner/Git packets are staged and post-stage verified; clean export must be built from tracked release surface and exclude physical ACL residues

nextAction: clean export may be created by an explicit release/export action; this preflight did not create artifacts
rule: This clean export preflight is evidence-only. It does not create archives, copy files, clean directories, delete files, stage, commit, or reset.
